title: Ancient Villages
description: Add japanese themed & vanilla friendly villages to your game! Custom questing, loot and NPC
body:
# 🏘️ Ancient Villages **Ancient Villages** is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft mod that adds **fully custom Japanese-inspired villages** to the world, designed to seamlessly integrate into the Minecraft universe. Built entirely using **The Dawn of Time** blocks, the mod expands the Dawn of Time ecosystem by connecting structures, armors, plants and gameplay systems into a single, coherent experience. The goal of Ancient Villages is to create **living settlements** with identity, stories and progression, while remaining faithful to Minecraft’s original mechanics. If you want to locate a village or a lone structure : `/locate structure ancientvillages:xxx` **The mod requires the following dependencies to work :** * [Dawn of Time](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dawn-of-time) * [Armor of the Ages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-of-the-ages) * [Garden Trails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garden-trails) * [Fusion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fusion-connected-textures) * [YetAnotherConfig (YACL)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yacl)
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## The Ancient Villages serie The **Ancient Villages** series introduces multiple **Japanese-style villages** spawning in **taiga biomes**, each built with unique layouts, scales and architectural styles. Each village follows a distinct theme: * **Military villages** * **Agricultural villages** * **Industrial villages** * **Commercial villages** Villages are not just decorative: they feature a **fully vanilla-friendly questing system** with unique stories to uncover. Players will interact with NPCs facing personal struggles such as **heritage conflicts, revenge, family dramas, religious pressure**, and more. By helping villagers and completing quests, players build their **reputation**, unlocking: * Access to powerful equipment * Advanced crafting opportunities * Deeper integration within village life Every village offers different stories, NPCs, house styles and progression paths, encouraging exploration and long-term involvement. ⚠️ **Early Release Notice** Ancient Villages is currently in **early release**. The mod is **stable and playable**, but actively being tested. Feedback during this testing phase is essential and will directly shape future updates. Players are strongly encouraged to share their experiences and suggestions. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits * **TheGoldenWorld** – creator of the whole project, mod and structures * [Superchache39](https://www.youtube.com/@superchache39) – datapack learning resources * [ChatGPT](https://openai.com/) – markdown formatting & feature design assistance * [Retro Diffusion](https://www.retrodiffusion.ai/) – logo generation * [Minecraft Title Generator](https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/) – banner creation
